summary: Grom Safety Gate testing complete. All features verified: (1) Unlinked Grom sees LIMITED Grom Community Preview on /feed, (2) Unlinked Grom blocked on /messages and /explore with full Safety Gate, (3) Unlinked Grom can access /profile, /settings, /grom-hq (allowed routes), (4) Grom Parent has full access to all routes, (5) Pro-Zone check endpoint returns correct blocked/can_go_live status. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: GromSafetyGate.js correctly integrates at ProtectedRoute level in App.js
GromLimitedFeed.js shows guardian code, limited posts preview, and locked features list
Pro-Zone check endpoint correctly calculates haversine distance and blocks within 0.5 miles
Admin users (is_admin=true) bypass Safety Gate entirely via user.is_admin check

linked_grom.name: Junior Wave Rider
linked_grom.note: Password not set - created via parent linking

context_for_next_testing_agent: Grom Safety Gate features verified: (1) ProtectedRoute in App.js wraps children with GromSafetyGate for Grom users. (2) /feed shows GromLimitedFeed for unlinked Groms with guardian code P4K7RL and 'Grom Community Preview'. (3) /messages, /explore show full Safety Gate block. (4) /profile, /settings, /grom-hq are always allowed. (5) Pro-Zone check at /api/social-live/pro-zone-check works correctly. (6) Grom Parent (testgromparent@gmail.com) has full access and sees linked Grom 'Junior Wave Rider' in Grom HQ.

features_verified.unlinked_grom_feed_limited: VERIFIED - Shows 'Parent Link Required' banner, guardian code P4K7RL, 'Grom Community Preview' with '3 POSTS' badge, 'Features locked until parent approval' list
features_verified.unlinked_grom_messages_blocked: VERIFIED - Full Safety Gate with 'Parental Link Required', guardian code, locked features list
features_verified.unlinked_grom_profile_allowed: VERIFIED - Profile page loads with 'Young Surfer Grom' name and 'Grom' badge
features_verified.unlinked_grom_settings_allowed: VERIFIED - Settings page loads with 'Grom Tools', Account info, Privacy & Safety
features_verified.unlinked_grom_grom_hq_allowed: VERIFIED - Grom HQ page loads showing 'No Linked Groms' (Grom viewing own status)
features_verified.grom_parent_full_access: VERIFIED - Full feed with posts, messages accessible, Grom HQ shows linked Grom
features_verified.grom_parent_grom_hq: VERIFIED - Shows '1 Linked Groms', 'Junior Wave Rider' with Grom badge, spending alert
features_verified.pro_zone_check_no_pro: VERIFIED - Returns blocked=false, can_go_live=true when no Pro nearby
features_verified.pro_zone_check_non_hobbyist: VERIFIED - Grom users not blocked by Pro-Zone
features_verified.grom_preview_feed_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns list of Grom posts (empty if no Grom posts)
features_verified.guardian_code_displayed: VERIFIED - P4K7RL shown in both Limited Feed and Safety Gate UI
